title: selaginella exasperata
intro: Selaginella exasperata is a type of spore-producing plant, also known as a lycopod, that belongs to the Selaginella genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selaginella exasperata can be found in the form of tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
